responses.welcome: Hello! Welcome to GrowWise School! 🎓 We serve Tri-Valley families with these program areas: {categories}. How can we help today?
responses.courses: GrowWise School offers tutoring, accelerated math, English and writing, STEM enrichment, coding, AI, robotics, workshops, and camps. Tell us your child's grade or interests and we can suggest a path.
responses.assessment: We offer complimentary assessments and trial-style experiences on many tracks. Our team can recommend the right fit after a short conversation.
responses.pricing: Pricing depends on the programs that fit your goals. Book a free assessment and we'll share clear options—no surprises.
responses.contact: You can reach us by phone, email at contact@growwiseschool.org, or this chat. We typically respond within 24 hours.
responses.fallback: Happy to help! GrowWise School focuses on tutoring, accelerated math, English and writing, STEM enrichment, coding, AI, robotics, workshops, and camps. What would you like to explore?

hero.title: About GrowWise
hero.subtitle: Since 2024, GrowWise has been transforming education in Dublin, CA, through personalized K-12 instruction and innovative STEAM programs. We empower every student with the skills, knowledge, and confidence they need to succeed.

foundation.title: Our Foundation
foundation.subtitle: Everything we do is guided by our core mission, vision, and values that put student success at the center.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 2024 in the heart of Dublin, California, GrowWise was born from a simple but powerful vision: every child deserves personalized education that meets them where they are and helps them reach their full potential.
story.p2: What started as a small tutoring center has grown into a comprehensive educational institution serving families throughout the Tri-Valley area. Our founder, Anshika Verma, recognized that traditional one-size-fits-all education wasn't serving the diverse learning needs of today's students.
story.p3: Today, GrowWise stands as a testament to what's possible when passionate educators combine proven teaching methods with innovative technology and genuine care for each student's success. We've helped over 325+ students not just improve their grades, but develop confidence, curiosity, and a lifelong love of learning.

achievements.title: Our Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Numbers that reflect our commitment to student success and educational excellence.

approach.title: Our Educational Approach
approach.subtitle: We believe effective education requires more than delivering content. Our approach is built on four core principles that ensure every student receives the support they need to succeed.

founder.title: Meet Our Founder
founder.subtitle: Learn about the visionary leader who founded GrowWise with a passion for transforming education.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Our passionate educators bring years of experience and genuine care for student success to every lesson.

community.title: Community Impact
community.subtitle: We believe in giving back to the community that supports us, creating opportunities for all students to succeed.

testimonials.title: Why Parents Love GrowWise
testimonials.subtitle: Personalized learning. Real growth. Measurable success — every student, every grade.

location.title: Visit Our Dublin Center
location.subtitle: Located in the heart of Dublin, CA, our modern facility provides the perfect environment for learning and growth.

Experienced instructors in coding, math & robotics
Serving Dublin, Pleasanton, San Ramon & Tri-Valley families

trustReviews.quote: GrowWise has been such a wonderful experience for my daughter. Her tutor has been incredibly patient, encouraging, and attentive to her individual learning needs. Since starting with GrowWise, I’ve noticed a big improvement in her confidence, focus, and overall understanding of subjects that used to be challenging for her. The lessons are engaging and tailored to her pace, which has made learning enjoyable instead of stressful. I’m truly grateful for the positive impact GrowWise has had on her academic growth and motivation.

My son and I had a very positive experience with Growwise recently. My son attended the half-day python coding camp (Level 1 & 2), which was his first formal exposure to programming. Thanks to the small class size and the teacher's personalized approach, he was able to grasp the fundamentals of python and enjoyed working on the assignments and demo projects such as the Hangman game. The teacher provided prompt feedback after each session and offered helpful suggestions for future learning opportunities. I strongly recommend this program!

My daughter joined Growwise to begin learning the basics of coding, starting with Roblox development. She had a fantastic experience throughout the program! The classes were engaging, and the teacher did a great job keeping the students interested and motivated. It was wonderful to see her enjoying herself while learning something so valuable.

highlights.heading: Summer STEAM & Coding Camps
highlights.intro: GrowWise summer STEAM camp Dublin CA 2026 — weekly sessions from June through August for grades K–12. Families across Dublin, Pleasanton, San Ramon, Danville, and Livermore trust our small-group, expert-led programs.

programs.title: Coding & Python
programs.description: Our summer coding camp in Dublin, CA offers structured Python coding for kids and Scratch pathways — the coding camp kids across the Tri-Valley trust.

programs.title: Math & Olympiad
programs.description: Summer math camp in Dublin, CA with Math Olympiad prep for grades 4–8 and advanced Algebra for high schoolers. Competition-level problem-solving.

programs.title: AI & Machine Learning
programs.description: AI camp for kids in Dublin, CA — grades 7–12 build real-world projects. Our machine learning camp for kids covers modern tools and entrepreneurship.

programs.title: Robotics
programs.description: Robotics camp for kids in Dublin, CA — full-day hands-on engineering challenges that teach critical thinking, teamwork, and STEM fundamentals.

programs.title: Game Development
programs.description: Game development camp for kids turns screen time into skill-building. Students create playable games in Scratch, Roblox, and Minecraft.

programs.title: Young Authors
programs.description: Young authors camp summer 2026 — a full-day writing and publishing program where students produce a portfolio-ready book by the final day.

items.title: Expert Instructors
items.description: Small-group, project-based instruction led by experienced STEAM educators who keep kids engaged and challenged.

items.title: Proven Results
items.description: 98% parent satisfaction — students return year after year and build skills that last well beyond summer.

items.title: Flexible Scheduling
items.description: Half-day and full-day sessions, June through August, with week-by-week enrollment and early bird savings.

items.title: Tri-Valley Trusted
items.description: Families in Dublin, Pleasanton, San Ramon, Danville, and Livermore choose GrowWise for quality STEM and coding education.
